title: Addio Mimí!
writer: Henri Murger, Hamilton Benz, Carmine Gallone
actors: Mártha Eggerth, Jan Kiepura, Janis Carter
plot: A modern adaptation of Puccini's opera La Boheme, this is the story of a group of struggling artists, poets, and musicians who struggle to survive in squalor without giving up their artistic ideals, and of two of them, Rene and De...
